input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.8.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.8.4.1
            TITLE: when charging, the ams and imd must:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.8.4.1: When Charging, the AMS and IMD must:
EV.8.4.1 When Charging, the AMS and IMD must: 
a. Monitor the Accumulator  
b. Open the Charging Shutdown Circuit if a fault is detected.

final_answer:
When Charging, the AMS and IMD must:
a. Monitor the Accumulator
b. Open the Charging Shutdown Circuit if a fault is detected.
